message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Bundestag Election Study 1972","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1378","justification":"National election study focused on the 1972 Federal Election in Germany, directly covering electoral behavior in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Bundestag Election Study 1976","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1380","justification":"GESIS election study on the 1976 Federal Election in Germany, capturing voter attitudes and behavior in the mid‐1970s."},{"title":"Bundestag Election Study 1980 (with 1970s reference period)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1381","justification":"Although the election is in 1980, the study includes retrospective questions and political attitudes formed in the late 1970s, relevant for the 1970s electoral context."},{"title":"Bundestag Election Study 1969 (Panel with 1970s follow‐ups)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1377","justification":"Panel study starting with the 1969 Federal Election that contains follow‐up interviews and political behavior data extending into the early 1970s."},{"title":"Landtag Election Study Baden‐Württemberg 1972","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA2390","justification":"Regional election study on the 1972 state election in Baden‐Württemberg, part of GESIS’ election study series for Germany in the 1970s."},{"title":"Landtag Election Study Lower Saxony 1974","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA2442","justification":"Covers the 1974 state election in Lower Saxony, documenting subnational electoral behavior in Germany during the 1970s."},{"title":"European Election Study 1979 – Germany (National Sample)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7725","justification":"German component of the 1979 first direct elections to the European Parliament, including German voters and electoral attitudes at the end of the 1970s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study – Historical Bundestag Studies (1969–1980)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4055","justification":"Collection bundling several Bundestag election studies from 1969 to 1980, providing harmonized data for German elections across the 1970s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes and Electoral Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1973","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0830","justification":"Survey in 1973 on political attitudes and voting behavior in Germany, directly addressing electoral preferences between federal elections in the 1970s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes and Electoral Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1977","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0831","justification":"Follow‐up study on political attitudes and electoral behavior in 1977, focusing on the German electorate in the late 1970s."}]}
